package handler

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Anti-pattern: GORM model struct (Product) is defined inside the handler package
// instead of a dedicated models/models package. Persistence structs should live
// in a models package, not co-located with HTTP handlers.

type Product struct {
	ID    uint    `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	Name  string  `gorm:"column:name"`
	Price float64 `gorm:"column:price"`
}

func GetProduct(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	var product Product
	db.First(&product, id)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"product": product})
}
